title: Detailed Result: OMO Purchase Auction held on Mar 13, 2026 and Settlement on Mar 16, 2026
description: I. Summary OMO Purchase Results Aggregate Amount (Face value) notified by RBI : ₹50,000 crore Total amount offered (Face value) by participants : ₹1,07,869 crore Total amount accepted (Face value) by RBI : ₹50,000 crore II.
